case_title: BALWANT D THAKOR VS. MICHAEL DOUGLAS BRATCHER

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT BRATCHER, MICHAEL DOUGLAS
